mapper.select: SELECT ID, PATH, METHOD, IP, STATUS_CODE, USER_AGENT, CREATED_AT FROM VISIT_LOG ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC FETCH FIRST #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT ID, PATH, METHOD, IP, STATUS_CODE, USER_AGENT, CREATED_AT FROM VISIT_LOG WHERE PATH = #{path} ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC FETCH FIRST #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT ID, PATH, METHOD, IP, STATUS_CODE, USER_AGENT, CREATED_AT FROM VISIT_LOG ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM VISIT_LOG WHERE TRUNC(CREATED_AT) = TRUNC(SYSDATE)
SELECT PATH, COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM VISIT_LOG GROUP BY PATH ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC FETCH FIRST #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT TO_CHAR(TRUNC(CREATED_AT), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS STAT_DATE, COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM VISIT_LOG WHERE CREATED_AT >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) - #{days} + 1 GROUP BY TRUNC(CREATED_AT) ORDER BY TRUNC(CREATED_AT)
